title: Case report: Secretory carcinoma of the breast with ETV6-NTRK3 fusion: clinicopathological features and molecular confirmation by FISH in two cases.
abstract: Secretory carcinoma of the breast (SCB) is an extremely rare malignant neoplasm, accounting for less than 0.15% of all breast carcinomas. It is characterized by distinctive secretory activity, a frequently triple-negative immunophenotype, and recurrent ETV6-NTRK3 fusion (1-3).
trial_name: A Phase 1/2 Study of Repotrectinib in Patients With ROS1 or NTRK Fusion-Positive Advanced Solid Tumors
